prompt: We have discovered errors in the general ledger for January and February 2026. Review all vouchers and find the 4 errors: a posting to the wrong account (account 6500 used instead of 6540, amount 7350 NOK), a duplicate voucher (account 7100, amount 3200 NOK), a missing VAT line (account 6540, amount excl. 11450 NOK missing VAT on account 2710), and an incorrect amount (account 6300, 8200 NOK posted instead of 5800 NOK). Correct all errors with appropriate correction vouchers.
